data.title: IMI: Strong FY25 Delivery, Buyback Upside and Underappreciated FY26 Earnings Power Support Buy Rating
data.description:
Jefferies analyst Andrew Douglas maintained a Buy rating on IMI plc today and set a price target of p3,185.00.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Andrew Douglas has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors including IMI’s stronger‑than‑expected FY25 performance and solid balance sheet, which together support a sizeable £500m share repurchase launched earlier and larger than he had anticipated. He also notes that the company delivered robust organic sales growth, a 20% EBITA margin with year‑on‑year improvement, and earnings modestly ahead of his own estimates, underscoring effective execution and cash generation.

For FY26, management’s guidance points to another year of mid‑single‑digit organic revenue expansion and a further, albeit modest, lift in profitability, even after accounting for higher IT and cybersecurity spending. Douglas believes consensus earnings forecasts do not yet fully incorporate the effects of the planned Marine Truflo divestment and the buyback, while he sees potential for the Industrial Automation business to outperform guidance later in the year, leading him to view any short‑term share price pullbacks as attractive entry points.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
